violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Various food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, noodles were placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Noodles were placed on sheet pans in the walk-in cooler to finish cooling at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Imitation crab meat was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Food was placed in walk-in cooler to thaw at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The chest freezer lid, and the 2 door reach-in freezer gasket was observed with tape holding them together and in poor repair. Equipment and gaskets mist be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the sauce containers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The ceiling in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2026

Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

Pork and egg rolls were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At the time of inspection, noodles were placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

Working containers of sugar, flour and sesame seeds are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
Inspector observed shoes being stored on top of oil. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
Inspector observed utensils being stored in an egg carton, single service items are for one time use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
Chest freezer was not in good repair, observed lid being held together with tape. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
